title: Senior Backend Engineer - Subscriptions
score_reasoning: Your senior-level experience and background in high-scale payment/subscription systems (€2M/month billing engine at Stackflo) directly align with the Subscriptions mission. Python/Go expertise and observability practices match well for scaling commerce and personalization systems at global scale. However, London as the stated location without explicit remote confirmation creates a >2h timezone offset from Berlin; your profile prioritizes remote work with strict ±2h overlap preference. The posting focuses on business outcomes and user journey but lacks specific technical stack details, making it hard to validate Python/Go or architecture patterns. The growth potential is strong given the domain and scale, but location ambiguity and vague technical requirements prevent a higher score.

red_flags: Location stated as London—unclear if remote or on-site required
Sparse technical requirements—no mention of tech stack or architecture
Timezone drift >2h from your preference without explicit remote-first language

description:
The Subscriptions Mission builds and scales the products, platforms, and business models that convert free listeners into lifelong Premium subscribers. We focus on driving acquisition, optimizing conversion, improving retention, and delivering seamless commerce experiences that fuel Spotify’s growth and bring fans closer to the creators they love.

At Spotify, our Subscriptions data powers the decision engines and experiences behind our 700M+ Monthly Active Users and 290M+ Premium subscribers. You’ll join a collaborative, cross-functional team focused on building the systems that power merchandising, personalization, and seamless subscription experiences at global scale. Together, we shape how users discover value and choose to stay with Spotify.
